## Task Description

A clear description of what needs to be done.

## File(s) to Change

List the specific files involved so the contributor knows exactly where to look.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Helpful Context

Any background, links, or pointers that will help a first-time contributor understand the task.

## Estimated Effort

Small (under 2 hours) / Medium (half a day) / Large (full day)
